scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev --prefix work-management/backend" "npm run dev --prefix work-management/frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3001/api/dashboard && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=true electron ."
scripts.electron:only: wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3001/api/dashboard && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=true electron .
scripts.electron:build: npm run build --prefix work-management/backend && npm run build --prefix work-management/frontend && electron-builder --publish never
